name: Medallions of Pork Tenderloins
recipeInstructions:
1. Pat the meat dry with paper towels.
2. In a bowl, mix salt, pepper and flour; dredge the medallions in flour, shaking off excess.
3. Beat eggs with water; dip the medallions in egg and coat with bread crumbs.
4. Press the medallions with the heel of your palm to make the crumb adhere; let them dry for 10 minutes.
5. In a Dutch oven, heat butter and oil over medium heat. Sauté the medallions for 8 minutes per side.
6. Remove the meat from the pan; drain on paper towels and transfer to a heated platter, keeping warm.
7. Add wine to the pan; deglaze over high heat, scraping brown bits from the bottom and sides of the pan.
8. Reduce liquid by half (about 3 minutes), then add mushrooms and cook for 2 minutes, stirring.
9. Add lemon juice and cook for 1 minute, stirring.
10. Adjust seasonings if needed, pour the sauce over the meat and garnish with parsley.
